title: AegonCraft
description: This modpack was created for those who do not have the most powerful computer for large assemblies or those who want something lighter. So if you're tired of vanilla or just want something new, then welcome to AegonCraft
body:
This assembly was created for those who do not have the most powerful computer for large assemblies or those who want something lighter. So if you're tired of vanilla and want something new, then welcome to AegonCraft.
This assembly changes the generation, adding many new biomes, as well as many new structures, plus improving old ones. So it will become much more interesting to explore.
Also in fashion there are mods that give you a lot of new decorations, so long live creativity.
In addition to this, there is a lot of new armor and weapons, and the cherry is an improved combat system.
In a word, go for it
